data.title: Graco Extend2Fit Convertible Car Seat, Rear and Forward Facing Car Seat with Adjustable Extension Panel for Extra Legroom, Gr

features: Convertible car seat grows with your child from rear-facing harness (4-50 lb) to forward-facing harness (26.5-65 lb)
Extend2Fit 4-position adjustable extension panel provides up to 5" additional legroom
allowing your child to safely ride rear-facing longer
Graco ProtectPlus Engineered to the newest testing standards for side and frontal impact
and beyond—because the safety of your child shouldn’t stop at the standard
No-Rethread Simply Safe Adjust Harness System allows the headrest and harness to adjust together in one motion
